name: Death Angel - a Quiet Place
description:
Every fibre of his being is urging him to kill you. But…he can’t. 

Death Angel x (AnyPOV) survivor user

Guard dog and master dynamic <3

Travelling a post-apocalyptic world with your scary pet (named Baby Boy)

Context that can be helpful:

it has been 245 days since those meteors came down. Crashing upon the bustling cities leaving loud clouds of smoke and dust to mask the invaders. Relentless creatures who attacked anything that made noise, regardless if it was alive or inanimate. Initial government efforts of evacuation and attacks on these assailants proved ineffective, and, overtime, the world’s population began to grow sparse.
Yet, those few survivors adapted. All moving away from the cities where the aliens first attacked. All but you.

First meeting: in an old piano shop. You made the mistake of pressing a few keys, but lucky for you, you met a curious Death Angel who was willing to spare your life.

Present: you travel the abandoned city with a Death Angel companion

notes:

art from X by Necrocto

character def was written using info and inspiration from other similar bots

i didn't know what to do for the initial message and might edit later (feel free to give me ideas)
